examples.text: Nearly 1.5 million visitors flock here every year to watch rockets, spacecraft, and satellites blast off into the solar system from Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex.

reviewSessions.example_text: Nearly 1.5 million visitors flock here every year to watch rockets, spacecraft, and satellites blast off into the solar system from Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案抓住了“升空”的核心意思，但缺少“发射”这一层含义。
